visual_summary: A full screen grid component with a colorful, text-based background image. Use this component when you want to create a visually striking, grid-based layout for large areas of content. It's ideal for demo sections, hero areas, or other pages where you want to draw attention to a key concept or feature.

- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
